evals.name: web-react-vite
evals.prompt: 帮我新建一个 React 项目,叫 portfolio-site,我想做个展示作品的 dashboard 页面
evals.expected_output: A Vite+React+TS project named portfolio-site, using bun, with biome.json extending @illustrix/shared-configs/biome, ESLint removed, strict tsconfig, git initialized.

evals.name: ts-library
evals.prompt: I want to create a TypeScript npm package called tiny-result that exports a Result type
evals.expected_output: A publishable TS library named tiny-result, bun-based, with exports/types fields, dist build via bun build + tsc, biome extending shared config, strict tsconfig, git initialized.

evals.name: node-cli
evals.prompt: 搭个命令行工具 mds,功能是把 markdown 转成 html
evals.expected_output: A bun-based CLI named mds with a bin field, shebang, src/index.ts entry, biome extending shared config, strict tsconfig, git initialized.
